title: null handling in some sql statements is incorrect
poc: select null between null and null;
key_bug_features: incorrect null handling in SQL statements
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_null_handling (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_null_handling (id, value, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Test NULL handling');
SELECT value FROM test_null_handling WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_null_handling WHERE value IN (NULL, 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_null_handling WHERE description BETWEEN NULL AND 'Test';
